equipment.name: Mower
maintenance: Sharpen blade before spring growth or whenever cut quality declines.
Keep tall fescue on the higher side.
Do not remove more than about one-third of the blade at once.
equipment.operatingNotes: Mulch clippings unless they are clumpy, diseased, or smothering the turf.

equipment.name: Broadcast spreader
maintenance: Clean after fertilizer or herbicide use.
Record exact setting, product, rate, and result after each application.
equipment.operatingNotes: Use label guidance first. Start conservatively if the exact model setting is unknown.

equipment.name: Rain gauge / catch-can test
equipment.operatingNotes: Use for sprinkler output testing and rain verification before changing irrigation habits.
